button.name: action_previous
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or not checklist_tracking_line or not active or not previous_btn_visiblity
button.title: Previous

button.name: action_next
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or not active or checklist_dept_status == 'to_do' or checklist_dept_status == 'in_progress'
button.title: Next

button.name: action_create_checklist
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or checklist_counts != 0 or not active or not visible_checklists_btn
button.title: Create Checklist

button.name: action_view_checklist
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or checklist_counts == 0 or not visible_checklists_btn

field.name: amount_due_warning
field.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or not invoice_ids or not amount_due_warning

field.name: workflow_master_id
field.invisible: service_count == 1 or workflow_count == 1 or not service_category_id

field.name: service_id
field.invisible: service_count == 1 or not service_category_id or is_marriage_category

field.name: date_delay_waring
field.invisible: not is_marriage_category or not date_delay_waring or type == 'opportunity'

div.invisible: not is_propertychecklist_needed or type != 'opportunity' or not order_ids

field.name: partner_id
field.context: {'default_name': contact_name,'default_title': title,'default_street': street, 'default_street2': street2,'default_city': city, 'default_state_id': state_id,'default_zip': zip,'default_country_id': country_id,'default_function': function,'default_phone': phone,'default_mobile': mobile, 'default_email': email_from, 'default_user_id': user_id,'default_team_id': team_id,'default_website': website,'default_lang': lang_code,'show_vat': True }

label.invisible: mobile == phone or phone or new_or_existing_customer != 'new_customer' or partner_id or type == 'opportunity'

button.name: action_mob_same_as_phone
button.invisible: mobile == phone or phone or new_or_existing_customer != 'new_customer' or partner_id or type == 'opportunity'

progressbar.help: This bar allows to filter the opportunities based on scheduled activities.

field.name: amount_due_warning
field.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or not invoice_ids or not amount_due_warning

field.name: amount_due_warning
field.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or not invoice_ids or not amount_due_warning

filter.name: assigned_to_me
filter.help: Opportunities that are assigned to me

xpath.attribute: type == 'lead' or not active or order_ids
